item.title: Leetcodeday38 49
item.description: dp数组及下标含义 递推公式 dp数组初始化的值 遍历顺序 打印dp数组 for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++) for (int j = 0; j <= m; j++) if (j!=0 && j % m == 0) printf("f[%d][%d]:%d \n",i,j,f[i][j]); else printf("f[%d][%d]:%d ",i,j,f[i][j]); printf("%d",f[n][m]); return 0; day38 [509]:斐波那契数 /* *@number[509]:斐波那契数 *@author:lls86 *@desc:dfs *@reference: *@time:2022-12-31 10:24:41 */ class Solution { public: int res[31]{0, 1}; int result{0}; void dfs(int i, int n) { if (i > n) return; result = res[i - 1] + res[i - 2]; res[i] = result; dfs(i + 1, n); } int fib(int n) { if (n == 0) return 0; else if (n == 1) return 1; dfs(2, n); return result; } }; /* *@number[509]:斐波那契数 *@author:lls86 *@desc:dp *@reference: *@time:2022-12-31 10:24:41 */ class Solution { public: int fib(int n) { if (n <= 1) return n; int dp[2]; dp[0] = 0; dp[1] = 1; for (int i = 2; i <= n; i ++) { int sum = dp[0] + dp[1]; dp[0] = dp[1]; dp[1] = sum; } return dp[1]; } }; [70]:爬楼梯 /* *@number[70]:爬楼梯 *@author:lls86 *@desc: *@reference: *@time:2023-01-03 17:05:59 */ class Solution { public: int res[3]{1, 1, 2}; int climbStairs(int n) { if (n == 1) return 1; for (int i = 3; i <= n; i ++) { int result = res[1] + res[2]; res[1] = res[2]; res[2] = result; } return res[2]; } }; [746]:使用最小花费爬楼梯 /* *@number[746]:使用最小花费爬楼梯 *@author:lls86 *@desc: *@reference: *@time:2022-01-03 09:59:32 */ class Solution { public: int minCostClimbingStairs(vector<int> &cost) { int pre{0}, cur{0}; for (int i = 2; i < cost.

item.title: Leetcodeday17 27
Leetcodeday9 16
item.description: day9 [28]:找出字符串中第一个匹配项的下标 /* * @number[28]:找出字符串中第一个匹配项的下标 * @author: lls86 * @desc: * @time:2022-11-24 16:49:02 */ class Solution { public: int strStr(string haystack, string needle) { const int N = needle.size(); int ne[N]; ne[0] = -1; //next[] figure for (int i = 1, j = -1; i < needle.size(); i++) { // 若前后缀匹配不成功 // 反复令 j 回退，直至到 -1 或是 s[i] == s[j + 1] while (j != -1 && needle[i] != needle[j + 1]) j = ne[j]; // 匹配成功时，最长相等前后缀变长，最长相等前后缀最后一位变大 if (needle[i] == needle[j + 1]) j++; // 令 ne[i] = j，以方便计算 next[i + 1] ne[i] = j; //cout << ne[i] << endl; } // kmp start !

item.title: Leetcodeday1 8
item.description: /* * @number[${question.frontendQuestionId}]:${question.title} * @author: lls86 * @desc: * @time:$!velocityTool.date() */ \#include "../func.h" ${question.code} day1 数组 """ @number704:二分查找 @author: lls86 @desc:双指针、数组 @time:2022-11-17 23:59:21 """ class Solution: def search(self, nums: list[int], target: int) -> int: left = 0 right = len(nums) - 1 print(right) while left <= right: mid = (left + right) // 2 # /是精确除法，//是向下取整除法，%是求模 if nums[mid] == target: return mid elif nums[mid] > target: right = mid - 1 else: left = mid + 1 return -1 """ @number27:移除元素 @author: lls86 @desc:双指针、数组 @time:2022-11-18 16:43:58 """ class Solution: def removeElement(self, nums: List[int], val: int) -> int: a = 0 b = 0 while a < len(nums): if nums[a] !
